name: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Premium wireless headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and ultra-comfortable memory foam ear cushions. Experience studio-quality sound anywhere you go.

name: Premium Leather Backpack
description: Hand-crafted genuine leather backpack with padded laptop compartment, multiple organizational pockets, and water-resistant finish. Perfect for work and travel.

name: Smart Fitness Watch Pro
description: Advanced fitness tracker with GPS, heart rate monitor, sleep tracking, and 50+ workout modes. Water-resistant to 50m with a stunning AMOLED display.

name: Minimalist Desk Lamp
description: Sleek, modern desk lamp with adjustable color temperature, brightness control, and USB charging port. Touch-sensitive controls with memory function.

name: Organic Coffee Bean Collection
description: Premium collection of three single-origin organic coffee beans from Ethiopia, Colombia, and Guatemala. Medium to dark roast, freshly roasted to order.

name: Ultra-Slim Laptop Stand
description: Ergonomic aluminum laptop stand with adjustable height and angle. Foldable design for portability. Compatible with all laptops up to 17 inches.

name: Handmade Ceramic Mug Set
description: Set of 4 artisan-crafted ceramic mugs in earth-tone glazes. Microwave and dishwasher safe. Each mug holds 12oz of your favorite beverage.

name: Premium Yoga Mat
description: Extra-thick 6mm yoga mat made from natural tree rubber with alignment markings. Non-slip surface on both sides for maximum grip and stability.

name: Vintage Sunglasses Collection
description: Retro-inspired polarized sunglasses with UV400 protection. Acetate frames in classic tortoiseshell pattern. Includes premium leather case.

name: Bluetooth Portable Speaker
description: Compact waterproof Bluetooth speaker with 360° sound, 20-hour battery, and built-in microphone. Perfect for outdoor adventures.

name: Scented Soy Candle Set
description: Set of 3 hand-poured soy candles in lavender, vanilla, and eucalyptus scents. 40-hour burn time each. Made with natural essential oils.

name: Running Shoes Pro Max
description: Lightweight performance running shoes with responsive foam cushioning, breathable mesh upper, and durable rubber outsole. Available in multiple colors.
